headline: General Mills Reintroduces Beloved La Tiara Brand
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 16, 2026--General Mills revives La Tiara taco shell brand, creating over 100 local jobs and expanding from regional to national availability for the first time.

headline: Is General Mills, Inc. (GIS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GIS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on General Mills, Inc. on Compounding Quality’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GIS. General Mills, Inc.’s share was trading at $43.57 as of March 5th. GIS’s trailing and forward P/E were 9.37 and 11.86 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
